label: Governance Coherence Reward
description: When thesis, invariants, rules, and enforcement all align, the world achieves governance coherence — the gold standard.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Thesis clarity >70%, invariant quality >70%, and enforcement is active.
causal_translation.rule_text: Governance coherence is achieved when thesis, invariants, rules, and enforcement form a single unified system. Each element reinforces the others.
causal_translation.shift_text: The world moves from a collection of constraints to a coherent governance architecture.
causal_translation.effect_text: Full-stack enforcement: +20% integrity + COHERENT. Structural: +12% + COHERENT. Pattern-only: +5%.
